case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. STARLETTA L JONES et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
